ast.name: description
ast.source: Generate HTML infographic from selection or active note
ast.target: 根据选区或活动笔记生成HTML信息图

ast.name: description
ast.source: Read the content of a text-based vault file in Obsidian by name or by detecting the currently active file.
ast.target: 通过名称或检测当前活动文件，读取Obsidian中基于文本的保险库文件内容。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The name or path of the vault file to read
ast.target: 要读取的保险库文件的名称或路径

ast.name: description
ast.source: If no filename provided, set to true to read the currently active note
ast.target: 如果未提供文件名，设置为true以读取当前活动笔记

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create a new text-based vault file in Obsidian with the specified content and optional location.
ast.target: 在Obsidian中创建一个新的基于文本的保险库文件，包含指定内容和可选位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The file name or path. If no extension is provided, .md is added automatically.
ast.target: 文件名或路径。如果未提供扩展名，将自动添加.md。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The text content for the file (for example Markdown, Canvas JSON, Bases YAML, or plain text)
ast.target: 文件的文本内容（例如Markdown、Canvas JSON、Bases YAML或纯文本）

ast.name: description
ast.source: The folder path where the note should be created
ast.target: 笔记应创建到的文件夹路径

ast.name: description
ast.source: Comma-separated list of tags to add to Markdown notes
ast.target: 要添加到Markdown笔记的逗号分隔标签列表

ast.name: description
ast.source: Update or replace the content of an existing text-based vault file in Obsidian.
ast.target: 更新或替换Obsidian中现有基于文本的保险库文件的内容。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The name or path of the vault file to update
ast.target: 要更新的保险库文件的名称或路径

ast.name: description
ast.source: If true, update the currently active note
ast.target: 如果为true，则更新当前活动笔记

ast.name: description
ast.source: The new content to replace or append
ast.target: 要替换或追加的新内容

ast.name: description
ast.source: Update mode: 'replace' to replace all content, 'append' to add at end, 'prepend' to add at beginning
ast.target: 更新模式：'replace'替换所有内容，'append'在末尾添加，'prepend'在开头添加

ast.name: description
ast.source: Search text-based vault files by name or content. Returns matching file names.
ast.target: 按名称或内容搜索基于文本的保险库文件。返回匹配的文件名。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The search query (file name pattern or content to search)
ast.target: 搜索查询（文件名模式或要搜索的内容）

ast.name: description
ast.source: If true, search within text file contents; if false, search file names only
ast.target: 如果为true，在文本文件内容中搜索；如果为false，仅搜索文件名

ast.name: description
ast.source: Maximum number of results to return (default: 10)
ast.target: 要返回的最大结果数（默认：10）

ast.name: description
ast.source: List text-based vault files in a specific folder or the entire vault. Returns up to 'limit' files with total count.
ast.target: 列出特定文件夹或整个保险库中的基于文本的保险库文件。返回最多'limit'个文件及总数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The folder path to list notes from. Leave empty for root.
ast.target: 要列出笔记的文件夹路径。留空表示根目录。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If true, include notes in subfolders
ast.target: 如果为true，包含子文件夹中的笔记

ast.name: description
ast.source: Maximum number of files to return (default: 50, configurable)
ast.target: 要返回的最大文件数（默认：50，可配置）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create a new folder in the vault.
ast.target: 在保险库中创建一个新文件夹。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The path of the folder to create
ast.target: 要创建的文件夹路径

ast.name: description
ast.source: List all folders in the vault.
ast.target: 列出保险库中的所有文件夹。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The parent folder to list subfolders from. Leave empty for all folders.
ast.target: 要列出子文件夹的父文件夹。留空表示所有文件夹。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Get information about the currently active vault file without reading its full content.
ast.target: 获取当前活动保险库文件的信息，而不读取其完整内容。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 删除一个基于文本的保险库文件。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The name or path of the vault file to delete
ast.target: 要删除的保险库文件的名称或路径

ast.name: description
ast.source: Propose renaming or moving a text-based vault file. Changes are NOT applied immediately - a confirmation dialog is shown first. The user must click Apply to rename, or Discard to cancel.
ast.target: 提议重命名或移动一个基于文本的保险库文件。更改不会立即应用 - 首先会显示一个确认对话框。用户必须点击“应用”来重命名，或点击“放弃”来取消。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The current path of the vault file
ast.target: 保险库文件的当前路径

ast.name: description
ast.source: The new path for the vault file
ast.target: 保险库文件的新路径

ast.name: description
ast.source: Get RAG synchronization status for files. Can check if specific files are synced, when they were imported, if there are differences from current content, and list unsynced files in a directory.
ast.target: 获取文件的RAG同步状态。可以检查特定文件是否已同步、何时导入、与当前内容是否存在差异，并列出目录中未同步的文件。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Path to a specific file to check sync status for. Returns import time, sync status, and diff status.
ast.target: 要检查同步状态的特定文件路径。返回导入时间、同步状态和差异状态。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Directory path to list unsynced files. Returns list of files that have not been imported to RAG or have changes.
ast.target: 要列出未同步文件的目录路径。返回尚未导入到RAG或有更改的文件列表。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If true, return sync status summary for all files in the vault.
ast.target: 如果为true，返回保险库中所有文件的同步状态摘要。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Propose an edit to an existing text-based vault file. Changes are NOT applied immediately - a confirmation dialog is shown first. The user must click Apply to write changes, or Discard to cancel. Use this instead of update_note for safer editing workflow.
ast.target: 提议编辑一个现有的基于文本的保险库文件。更改不会立即应用 - 首先会显示一个确认对话框。用户必须点击“应用”来写入更改，或点击“放弃”来取消。对于更安全的编辑工作流，请使用此功能代替update_note。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The name or path of the vault file to edit
ast.target: 要编辑的保险库文件的名称或路径

ast.name: description
ast.source: If true, edit the currently active note
ast.target: 如果为true，则编辑当前活动笔记

ast.name: description
ast.source: The new content to propose (required for replace/append/prepend modes)
ast.target: 要提议的新内容（对于replace/append/prepend模式为必需）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Edit mode: 'replace' replaces all content (requires newContent), 'append' adds at end (requires newContent), 'prepend' adds at beginning (requires newContent), 'patch' applies search-and-replace patches (requires patches)
ast.target: 编辑模式：'replace'替换所有内容（需要newContent），'append'在末尾添加（需要newContent），'prepend'在开头添加（需要newContent），'patch'应用搜索替换补丁（需要patches）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Array of search-and-replace patches (required for patch mode). Each patch replaces the first occurrence of 'search' with 'replace'.
ast.target: 搜索替换补丁数组（对于patch模式为必需）。每个补丁将'search'的首次出现替换为'replace'。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The text to search for (exact match)
ast.target: 要搜索的文本（精确匹配）

ast.name: description
ast.target: 替换文本

ast.name: description
ast.source: Propose deletion of a text-based vault file. The file is NOT deleted immediately - a confirmation dialog is shown first. The user must click Delete to confirm, or Cancel to keep the file. Use this for safe deletion workflow.
ast.target: 提议删除一个基于文本的保险库文件。文件不会立即删除 - 首先会显示一个确认对话框。用户必须点击“删除”来确认，或点击“取消”来保留文件。请使用此功能进行安全的删除工作流。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Propose edits to multiple text-based vault files at once. A confirmation dialog shows all files with checkboxes for selective application. Use this when editing many files to avoid multiple individual confirmations.
ast.target: 提议同时编辑多个基于文本的保险库文件。一个确认对话框会显示所有文件，并带有复选框供选择性应用。当编辑多个文件时，请使用此功能以避免多次单独确认。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 编辑操作数组

ast.name: description
ast.source: The new content for the vault file
ast.target: 保险库文件的新内容

ast.name: description
ast.target: 编辑模式：'replace'、'append' 或 'prepend'

ast.name: description
ast.source: Propose renaming/moving multiple text-based vault files at once. A confirmation dialog shows all renames with checkboxes for selective application. Use this when renaming many files to avoid multiple individual confirmations.
ast.target: 提议同时重命名/移动多个基于文本的保险库文件。一个确认对话框会显示所有重命名操作，并带有复选框供选择性应用。当重命名多个文件时，请使用此功能以避免多次单独确认。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 重命名操作数组

ast.name: description
ast.source: Propose deletion of multiple text-based vault files at once. A confirmation dialog shows all files with checkboxes for selective deletion. Use this when deleting many files to avoid multiple individual confirmations.
ast.target: 提议同时删除多个基于文本的保险库文件。一个确认对话框会显示所有文件，并带有复选框供选择性删除。当删除多个文件时，请使用此功能以避免多次单独确认。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Array of file names or paths to delete
ast.target: 要删除的文件名或路径数组

ast.name: description
ast.source: The workflow ID to run (format: skillName/workflowName, discovered from the skill's SKILL.md)
ast.target: 要运行的工作流ID（格式：skillName/workflowName，从技能的SKILL.md中发现）

ast.name: description
ast.source: JSON object of input variables to pass to the workflow (e.g. {"filePath": "notes/todo.md"})
ast.target: 要传递给工作流的输入变量的JSON对象（例如 {\"filePath\": \"notes/todo.md\"}）

ast.name: description
ast.source: JavaScript code to execute. Use `return` to return a value. The variable `input` contains the input data if provided.
ast.target: 要执行的JavaScript代码。使用 `return` 来返回一个值。变量 `input` 包含提供的输入数据（如果有）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional input data available as the `input` variable in the code.
ast.target: 可选输入数据，在代码中作为 `input` 变量使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create and edit Obsidian Flavored Markdown with wikilinks, embeds, callouts, properties, and other Obsidian-specific syntax. Use when working with .md files in Obsidian, or when the user mentions wikilinks, callouts, frontmatter, tags, embeds, or Obsidian notes.
ast.target: 创建和编辑 Obsidian 风格的 Markdown，支持 wikilinks、嵌入、callouts、属性及其他 Obsidian 特定语法。适用于在 Obsidian 中处理 .md 文件，或当用户提及 wikilinks、callouts、frontmatter、标签、嵌入或 Obsidian 笔记时使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create and edit JSON Canvas files (.canvas) with nodes, edges, groups, and connections. Use when working with .canvas files, creating visual canvases, mind maps, flowcharts, or when the user mentions Canvas files in Obsidian.
ast.target: 创建和编辑 JSON Canvas 文件 (.canvas)，包含节点、边、分组和连接。适用于处理 .canvas 文件、创建可视化画布、思维导图、流程图，或当用户提及 Obsidian 中的 Canvas 文件时使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create and edit Obsidian Bases (.base files) with views, filters, formulas, and summaries. Use when working with .base files, creating database-like views of notes, or when the user mentions Bases, table views, card views, filters, or formulas in Obsidian.
ast.target: 创建和编辑 Obsidian Bases (.base 文件)，包含视图、筛选器、公式和摘要。适用于处理 .base 文件、创建笔记的数据库式视图，或当用户提及 Obsidian 中的 Bases、表格视图、卡片视图、筛选器或公式时使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional list of node type names (as appearing after `#### ` in the spec) to restrict the returned content. Omit or pass [] to get the full spec.
ast.target: 可选的节点类型名称列表（如规范中 `#### ` 后出现的名称），用于限制返回的内容。省略或传递 [] 可获取完整规范。
